# OxRML

> Reasoning with Machines Lab at Oxford. Research on reliable, interpretable, and societally grounded machine learning, language models, and agentic AI systems.

Main site: https://oxrml.com/
Research: https://oxrml.com/research.html
Team: https://oxrml.com/team.html
News: https://oxrml.com/news.html
Contact: https://oxrml.com/contact.html

Project pages:
- https://oxrml.com/agent-slr/
- https://oxrml.com/measuring-what-matters/
- https://oxrml.com/faithfulness/
- https://oxrml.com/llm-medical-assistants/
- https://oxrml.com/lingoly-too/

Sitemap: https://oxrml.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://oxrml.com/robots.txt
